title: EtheriaMons
description: An addon for the Cobblemon mod that adds etherians from Monsters of Etheria
body:
This datapack is a Cobblemon addon I'm making to add etherians from Monsters of Etheria to Minecraft. I just think it'd be cute to see Etherians alongside Pokemon.

## Etherians currently added
- **Cryoball line**
- **Oinkoin line**
- **Spookims line**
- **Honumb line**
- **Ovelin line**
- **Carapinch**
- **Flyden line**
- **Elekity line**

![Oinkoin, Honumb, Carapinch, and Flyden on an island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95c4f2a8be448f01a7dced28431978b325d60f01.png)
_Look at the little guyz!_ **^ω^**

## Future plans
- Elusive variants
- Event skins
- Custom items
- Custom structures


## Installation
Place the file in your resourcepacks folder and in the datapacks folder of your world.

## Requirements
- Cobblemon v1.6.1
##


_All designs are from Monsters of Etheria and are owned by Uglypoe. All models, textures, and animations are created by me, but I do not take credit in the creation of the designs themselves. Be sure to check out the original game "Monsters of Etheria" on Roblox._
